acceptance_targets: [chapter_08_award_01] Pass if the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:35 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:61 lets a cold reader point to two dramatized beats on the page: one where Agnes's autonomy is actively overridden, and one where her pharmaceutical ethics are tested against another person's pressure. Fail if those turns still read primarily as narrated recap with no present-tense resistance to push against.

[chapter_08_craft_01] Pass if every notebook reference in the revised chapter, including snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:71 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:159, gives the same notebook count and the same hiding place. Fail if the chapter still presents competing versions a reader would have to reconcile by guesswork.

[chapter_08_dialogue_01] Pass if the revised dialogue in the span beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:123 contains at least two key facts that emerge through interruption, follow-up, or self-correction rather than a single uninterrupted speech block, and if no line in that span reads as a standalone moral thesis once lifted from its surrounding pressure. Fail if Agnes still delivers the scene's core meanings in polished paragraph-sized turns.

[chapter_08_prose_01] Pass if each revised closing sentence in the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:33, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:55, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:189 adds new factual pressure or new sensory residue rather than restating the meaning already visible in the immediately preceding lines. Fail if those beats still end by paraphrasing what the reader already understands.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:35 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:61 lets a cold reader point to two dramatized beats on the page: one where Agnes's autonomy is actively overridden, and one where her pharmaceutical ethics are tested against another person's pressure. Fail if those turns still read primarily as narrated recap with no present-tense resistance to push against.
findings.problem: The chapter's largest dramatic material arrives as retrospective dossier instead of live scene pressure. Agnes's stroke, the involuntary sale and placement, the ombudsman fight, the Walgreens career, the notebook system, and the fentanyl refusal are all specific, but too much of the chapter's emotional and ethical payload is delivered as immaculate recap. At shortlist standard, the revelation needs at least one present-tense dispossession beat and one ring-ethics beat that the reader watches happen, not only hears summarized.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the backstory spine at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:35, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:39, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:45, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:49 so at least one decisive override of Agnes's consent plays as a dramatized interaction rather than summary. Then tighten the resume-like history at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:67, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:71, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:83 by converting one ring-history beat into a live exchange or immediate triggered memory that forces Agnes to act, speak, or refuse in scene.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if every notebook reference in the revised chapter, including snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:71 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:159, gives the same notebook count and the same hiding place. Fail if the chapter still presents competing versions a reader would have to reconcile by guesswork.
findings.problem: The notebooks break continuity. This chapter says Agnes keeps three composition notebooks and hides them in the back of her closet, then repeats 'Three notebooks' when recruiting Carmen. The continuity sheet's canonical object state is four composition notebooks hidden under Agnes's mattress. Because the notebooks are a tracked future payoff object, this is not cosmetic; it creates a direct contradiction in both count and hiding place.
findings.rewrite_direction: Harmonize the notebook count and hiding place at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:71, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:79, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:159 with the canonical continuity fact so the same object state survives into the later destruction payoff.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised dialogue in the span beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:123 contains at least two key facts that emerge through interruption, follow-up, or self-correction rather than a single uninterrupted speech block, and if no line in that span reads as a standalone moral thesis once lifted from its surrounding pressure. Fail if Agnes still delivers the scene's core meanings in polished paragraph-sized turns.
findings.problem: The Agnes-Carmen reveal scene drifts into composed dialogue. Agnes gets multiple thesis-speech and mini-speech-diagnosis turns in perfectly complete units, especially when explaining her placement, the ring's safety work, and Carmen's own hesitation. Carmen has some interruption and self-correction, but not enough to keep the exchange from sounding transmitted rather than fought through. The issue is not stiffness; it is polish that turns pressure into briefing.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the exchange at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:143, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:155, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:167 so Agnes's precision survives without every key point arriving as a complete mini-speech. Let Carmen's procedure-first evasions interrupt, force clarification, or derail Agnes at least twice before the invitation lands.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if each revised closing sentence in the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:33, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:55, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:189 adds new factual pressure or new sensory residue rather than restating the meaning already visible in the immediately preceding lines. Fail if those beats still end by paraphrasing what the reader already understands.
findings.problem: The chapter sometimes translates its strongest beats into abstract diagnosis after the image or action has already landed. Helen's visit, the institutional trap, and Carmen reassembling her work face each arrive with enough concrete force to stand, but the next sentence often explains the meaning in thesis language. That undercuts Agnes's otherwise sharp compression by replacing afterimage with paraphrase.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revisit the closing sentences around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:33, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:55, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:189. Either cut the abstract diagnosis or replace it with a fresh concrete consequence, sensory residue, or new tactical pressure that Agnes notices in the moment.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: This is a dark comedy about elderly agency, institutional failure, and moral compromise in a setting most fiction treats as a punchline or a tragedy but never both. The risks the novel must take: render the comedy of octogenarians as pharmaceutical distributors without condescending to them or turning them into lovable rogues; make Carmen's escalating complicity fully legible without moralizing about it; show the bodily realities of aging — incontinence, tremor, cognitive decline, falls, the smell of a body that doesn't leave a building — with unsentimental specificity; render the economic desperation of both healthcare workers and uninsured buyers without turning either into social-issue abstractions; give the moral ambiguity of the ring genuine weight by refusing to resolve it into either 'they were wrong' or 'they were heroes.' The novel must trust readers to sit with complexity. When in doubt between too raw and too safe, choose raw. A nursing home that smells like potpourri is a nursing home written by someone who's never been in one.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: Euphemism for bodily functions, aging, economic shame, institutional dysfunction, or the realities of nursing home care is a craft failure. The novel's comedy and humanity depend on rendering what polite fiction glosses over: what it smells like to clean someone who can't clean themselves, what it costs to count coins for a bus fare, what oxycodone sells for per milligram on the secondary market, what a concussion looks like on an 88-year-old skull, what it sounds like when someone with Parkinson's tries to hold a coffee cup steady, what Burt's dementia actually looks like up close. If the prose flinches from these specifics, the novel loses its authority.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High — contractions are the default for all dialogue. Uncontracted forms appear only for emphasis, character-specific formality (Agnes's low contraction level), Carmen under extreme stress reverting to formal speech, or deliberate register choices. In a contemporary New Jersey nursing home, stiff diction is the anomaly, not the norm.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate high-intensity scenes with reflective interiority. Vary scene count: single-scene chapters for maximum compression, three-scene chapters for range. Comic chapters (3, 9) should feel structurally different from quiet character studies (7, 8, 12, 15), which should feel different from crisis chapters (11, 16, 17). Follow a confrontation with a reflection, an escalation with a domestic scene, a comic set piece with an elegiac one. If two consecutive chapters share the same rhythm, one needs redesigning.
prose_style_profile.diction: Grounded and specific. Drug names (oxycodone, alprazolam, hydroxychloroquine), nursing procedures (med pass, pill count, charting, fall assessment), body realities (incontinence, tremor, laceration, scalp bleed). No purple prose, no literary performance. The style should feel like someone who works with their hands is telling you the truth about what she saw.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person, varying by POV character. Carmen chapters are warm and sensory, anchored in the body and the immediate environment. Harry chapters are precise and calculating, with attention to numbers and angles. Agnes chapters are clinical and compressed. Lola chapters are winding and emotionally layered, with embedded memories. Earl chapters are spare and weighted, with silence doing as much work as language. Marcus chapters are kinetic, with physical movement and code-switching. Tammy chapters are flat and observational, her trained eye cataloguing what doesn't add up.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Varied by chapter and POV. Carmen chapters favor medium sentences with occasional long runs when she's anxious. Harry chapters are short and clipped. Comic set pieces (chapters 3 and 9) move between fast inventory and slow domestic beats. Quiet chapters (7, 12, 15) slow down and let space onto the page. No chapter should feel rhythmically identical to the one before it.
